title: stillingia cubana
intro: Stillingia cubana, also known as Yellowroot, is a perennial plant native to the Caribbean and Central America, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stillingia cubana include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Stillingia cubana can be made into teas, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall health and well-being.
